$comment: CAR SPECS, the arcade car-select card (machine / engine / max power + the ENG-TM-SUS-TIRE-BRA bars) shown on the character and rival screens. DISPLAY-ONLY: never folded into the sim, exactly like the news and rival-quote corpora. Keyed by TEAM id (e.g. 'team.madonna') OR by VEHICLE id (e.g. 'formula_classic_g3m2'); a team-id row wins over its car's vehicle-id row, so you can give a single team its own machine name/bars while every other team on that car model falls back to the model default below. Any car with NO row here just hides the card (absent-tolerant), so this whole feature ships wired and the ONLY later edit is tuning these numbers. Each bar is 0..barMax. THE NUMBERS BELOW ARE PLACEHOLDER ESTIMATES for the five SMGP car models, replace freely with the real per-team values.
